source_sentence: This call for tenders concerns the design, development, piloting, delivery, and maintenance of two public-facing chatbots to support the implementation and enforcement of both the Digital Services Act (DSA) and the AI Act.

doc_title: EC CNECT – DSA and AI Act Public Chatbots (CNECT2025OP0095)
subject: DSA chatbot
object: through key concepts of the DSA, provide tailored procedural advice, and support real-world engagement with platforms and authorities
source_sentence: The DSA chatbot will guide users (mainly citizens) through key concepts, provide tailored procedural advice, and support real-world engagement with platforms and authorities.

doc_title: EC CNECT – DSA and AI Act Public Chatbots (CNECT2025OP0095)
subject: AI Act chatbot
object: SMEs, start-ups, and stakeholders understand the AI Act and provide practical guidance on classification and compliance steps
source_sentence: This AI Act chatbot will help SMEs, start-ups, and other stakeholders understand the provisions of the regulation and will provide tailored, practical guidance on its application.

doc_title: EC CNECT – DSA and AI Act Public Chatbots (CNECT2025OP0095)
subject: Both chatbots
object: context-aware assistance by tailoring responses based on query nature, platform type, and user location or language
source_sentence: The chatbots shall employ smart, context-aware assistance. They must tailor responses based on the nature of the query, platform type, and user location or language.

doc_title: EC CNECT – DSA and AI Act Public Chatbots (CNECT2025OP0095)
subject: Both chatbots
object: intent recognition and dialogue management to identify the purpose behind user queries
source_sentence: Support intent recognition and dialogue management, by identifying the purpose behind user queries using simple, predefined categories, such as asking for information, reporting an issue, or requesting guidance.

doc_title: EC CNECT – DSA and AI Act Public Chatbots (CNECT2025OP0095)
subject: Both chatbots
object: official, verifiable EU sources such as legal texts and Commission guidance for all content
source_sentence: Rely exclusively on official, verifiable EU sources (e.g. legal texts of the DSA and the AI Act, Commission guidance, implementing and delegated acts, etc.).

doc_title: EC CNECT – DSA and AI Act Public Chatbots (CNECT2025OP0095)
subject: Both chatbots
object: that they are interacting with an AI-based chatbot, not a human, to comply with AI Act transparency obligations
source_sentence: Information to users that they are interacting with an AI-based chatbot, not a human (to comply with the transparency obligations under the AI Act).

doc_title: EC CNECT – DSA and AI Act Public Chatbots (CNECT2025OP0095)
subject: DSA chatbot
object: any assessment or judgement on whether a specific platform or conduct is in compliance with the DSA
source_sentence: The chatbot shall not provide, under any circumstance, an assessment, judgement, or opinion on whether a specific platform, service provider, or piece of conduct is in compliance with the Digital Services Act.

doc_title: EC CNECT – DSA and AI Act Public Chatbots (CNECT2025OP0095)
subject: Contractor
object: continued availability and functionality including regular security updates, vulnerability management, and bug correction
source_sentence: Maintenance shall include not only ensuring the continued availability and functionality of the system but also implementing regular security updates, vulnerability management, and the correction of bugs or errors.

doc_title: EC CNECT – DSA and AI Act Public Chatbots (CNECT2025OP0095)
subject: System
object: GDPR and EU institutional data protection requirements for user data processing
source_sentence: The privacy statement presented to users must clearly indicate the absence of profiling, automated decision-making producing legal effects, and evaluation of personal aspects.

doc_title: EC CNECT – DSA and AI Act Public Chatbots (CNECT2025OP0095)
subject: Both chatbots
object: layered navigation to provide digestible content with the option for deeper exploration
source_sentence: Apply layered navigation (e.g. progressive disclosure) to provide digestible content with the option for deeper exploration.
